headline: Pharma Just Got Its Workday Moment: Doceree's Daily Command Defines a New $30 Billion Software Category
summary: Every category-defining enterprise software company in the past three decades was built on the same insight: identify a function whose daily work spans a fragmented stack of point tools, then build the single product where that work actually happens. Salesforce did it for sales in 1999. Workday did it for HR in 2005. GitHub did it for engineering in 2008. Figma did it for design in 2016.

content.title: Pharma Just Got Its Workday Moment: Doceree's Daily Command Defines a New $30 Billion Software Category

thumbnail.caption: Doceree Introduces Daily Command — The System of Work for Pharma Brand Teams, Co-Built by 75 of the Industry's Most Senior Operators
